title: AEGIS
subtitle: AI-Enhanced Guardian & Intelligence System
description: A groundbreaking, production-ready Multi-Agent coding framework designed to solve reliability and safety challenges in autonomous software engineering. Built on LangGraph, it features a Graph-based State Machine coupled with Strict Docker Sandboxing. It enforces a Red-Green-Refactor loop, forcing agents to prove a bug exists before writing a fix, drastically reducing hallucinations. The architecture includes dynamic API load balancing, a CassetteChatModel for deterministic testing, real-time cost governance via OpenTelemetry, and persistent semantic memory powered by PostgreSQL and pgvector.

title: Athenis AI
subtitle: Enterprise Hybrid-RAG Platform
description: A highly scalable, enterprise-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) platform. It solves critical challenges in secure document processing, robust access control, multi-tenant cost tracking, and AI provider lock-in. By combining pgvector cosine similarity with PostgreSQL full-text search (BM25) via Reciprocal Rank Fusion, it achieves world-class retrieval precision. The system abstracts the LLM via litellm, allowing seamless switching between Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, or Ollama. Features include background document ingestion with Celery, JWT-based RBAC, and OpenTelemetry instrumentation.

title: Project Watchdog
subtitle: Proactive Conversational AI Assistant
description: An event-driven conversational AI assistant designed to automate early-stage data science workflows. Moving beyond traditional reactive command-response models, it features an autonomous 'Project Watchdog' service that continuously monitors the file system for new datasets. Upon detection, it proactively interrupts and triggers an analysis pipeline using LLM-based intent recognition and STT/TTS via Whisper. It fully automates Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) by generating and executing pandas/matplotlib code locally, compiling findings into a multi-page PDF report. Proven in a user study to reduce time-to-insight by ~90%.
